name: wi
description: An opinionated, low-token engineering loop: /wi:scan documents and bootstraps a repo (--refresh drift-checks it); /wi:dev brainstorms a feature with you then designs and builds it to an open PR; /wi:rpa turns a UiPath PDD into a built REFramework solution. Spec-driven, parallel subagent waves, isolated worktrees, ADR log, token report. Runs on Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Copilot CLI from one source.
